articles.author: Kyle Cooper
articles.title: Blue paint on bottom of Reflecting Pool appears to be peeling away - WTOP
articles.description: There’s a new twist in the ongoing saga to clean up the Reflecting Pool. Some of the new “American Flag Blue” paint used to coat the bottom appears to be peeling away.
articles.content: The bottom of the pool was painted at the direction of President Donald Trump and refilled with water about two weeks ago. Since then, algae that blooms in the Reflecting Pool every summer returned, … [+1456 chars]

articles.author: Sneha S K, Reuters
articles.title: RFK Jr. orders American exposed to hantavirus to stay quarantined against her will - USA Today
articles.description: The health secretary's order to keep the exposed American in hantavirus quarantine also goes against medical advice.
articles.content: U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has ordered an American passenger exposed to hantavirus on a cruise ship to remain in quarantine despite medical advice and against her will, according to … [+2796 chars]
